metadata.description: Green Train Skills - agent skills by 绿皮火车 for media processing, file management, and local AI

plugins.name: greentrain-media
plugins.description: Green Train media skills: download videos from YouTube and 1000+ sites, download X/Twitter videos, download Apple Podcasts episodes, convert PDFs to images, generate viral video titles from subtitles, and local TTS/STT on Apple Silicon

plugins.name: greentrain-files
plugins.description: Green Train file skills: free 100GB+ disk space with safe cleanup, organize 1000+ files with Smart Folders, convert office documents to a searchable knowledge base, and orchestrate all three in one workflow
